---
name: fp
description: "Use automatically for engineering goals, or when explicitly invoked with FP: or $fp. Do not use for casual or other non-engineering goals."
---

For engineering goals or explicit `FP:`/`$fp` invocation, read `fp/SKILL.md` as the canonical router; otherwise stay dormant. Use debug-first for unknown causes, one writer per shared multi-agent file set, and required-check evidence before completion.
